name: attribution
description: Captures marketing attribution metadata at every request boundary and persists it per-subject for lifetime source-tracing. Answers 'where did this signup / conversion come from?'. Two owned tables: (1) `attributions` — per-subject rolling profile with first-touch + last-touch snapshots, current-session state, aggregated touch counts, lifecycle state (anonymous / identified / converted / churned); (2) `attribution_touchpoints` — append-only ledger of every attribution-bearing request (UTM change, ad click, referrer switch). Every marketing/analytics event downstream snapshots the CURRENT attribution profile into its own `attribution` jsonb column at create-time (frozen — attribution changes after don't reshape historical events). Ships: `AttributionMiddleware` (captures utm_* + gclid + fbclid + ttclid + msclkid + sccid + referrer + landing_page from cookies + query params at request boundary), `AttributionContext` (request-scoped binding for domain code to read current attribution), `AttributionResolver` (looks up per-subject profile), `AttributionSnapshotBuilder` (builds the immutable jsonb blob for downstream event.attribution columns). Supports 5 click-ID sources: Google Ads (gclid), Meta (fbclid), TikTok (ttclid), Microsoft/Bing (msclkid), Snapchat (sccid). Attribution model: first-touch preserved forever; last-touch updates every attribution-bearing request; session-scoped touchpoints logged. Consent-gated — under `marketing` category consent tier; without consent, attribution captures only session_id + hashed_ip in an ephemeral in-memory context and refuses persistence past the session. Feeder for marketing + analytics + referrals + finance + notifications (Wave 5+).
planned_consumers: marketing (Wave 5 — ad-network forwarder reads AttributionSnapshotBuilder output on every conversion event)
analytics (Wave 5 — behavioral event fan-out snapshots current attribution on every track call)
referrals (Wave 5 — referral-link click captures a touchpoint; conversion attribution reads the referral leg)
finance (Wave 5 — subscription + invoice records carry frozen attribution for revenue-source rollups)
notifications (Wave 5 — welcome-email / abandoned-cart flows read attribution to select persona + copy)

tenant.description: Tenant-facing attribution reads (admin dashboards + campaign rollups) + per-subject profile + admin merge/reset actions. Users read their own via `/me/attribution`. Every route requires the `attribution_capture` entitlement; merge routes additionally require `attribution_merge` (Enterprise-only); rollup routes require `attribution_rollup` (Medium+); bulk import requires `attribution_import` (Enterprise-only).

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant read for support tooling + force-reset for GDPR / regulator-issued requests.
